flavourText: A ghostly performer that shifts between voices and forms. Match its skill to dispel it.
Coils around every idea and squeezes out the creativity. Structure your response to break free.
Lurks in every theatre seat, judging your every word. Write with precision to silence it.
Locked in a perpetual freeze frame. Only the right technique can bring it to life.
Flickers between shadow and spotlight. Name its design elements to trap it in the beam.
Smashes through conventions with alienation and cruelty. Know the practitioners to rebuild the wall.
Asks riddles wrapped in exam language. Only precise terminology unlocks its secrets.
Feeds on stage fright and missed cues. Prepare thoroughly and it shrinks to nothing.
